name: Lemon Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until soft.
2. Gradually add and mix in the sugar to form a creamy mixture.
3. Beat in the eggs, lemon rind, and lemon juice. Mix well.
4. Stir together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Combine this dry mixture with the butter mixture, mixing thoroughly.
6. Form the dough into a 2-inch roll on foil or waxed paper.
7. Chill the dough for 4-12 hours.
8. Slice cookies approximately 1/4 inch thick.
9. Place the cookie slices on a baking sheet and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes, or drop by teaspoonfuls onto the baking sheet and bake.
Makes 5 dozen.
